reviews.comment:
Dificultad para hacer la fila en época de turismo. No tienen infraestructura para atender muchos clientes.

(Translated by Google)
Difficulty lining up during peak tourist season. They lack the infrastructure to handle large numbers of customers.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, en verano a veces se forman filas sobre la ruta, pero los playeros manejan bien la atención. Unos maestros.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. In summer, lines sometimes form along the route, but the beach attendants handle the service well. They're masters.
